visa_types.full_text:
## Overview

## Who can Apply?
- Applicant granted a particular type of Visa is required to strictly adhere to the purpose of the visit declared by him/her. Any violation of Visa category may attract appropriate legal action or deportation.
- A tourist visa can be granted to a foreigner who does not have a residence or occupation in India and whose sole objective of visiting India is recreation, sightseeing, casual visit to meet friends and relatives, etc. No other
									activity is permissible on a tourist visa including business meetings. Those who are going to India for business meetings should apply for a Business Visa.
- A tourist visa is non-extendable and non-convertible.
- The duration of the visa is at the sole discretion of the Issuing Authority. Please note that the validity of the visa begins from the date of issue and not from the date of travel on your application form.
- The Tourist visa, 5-year / over validity is required biometrics process (fingerprint and portrait)

## Fees and Charges
If you wish to use Express service there will be additional cost of 4,720 KRW. (Please be noted that Express service is available only for Korean passport holders.)
You may use a courier service (optional) with a cost of 9,000 KRW to receive your passport at your place for your convenience.
For more information about additional services, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/kor/en/ind/additional-services).
Please remit your fees to the following bank account:
Name of Bank: Shinhan Bank Bank Account Number: 140-014-727882 Account Holder Name: 브이에프에스코리아(VFS South Korea)
Payment receipt must be submitted to the centre in Seoul along with your application.
Please be noted that personal / company cheques, mobile / Phone banking receipts, ATM receipts or cash would not be accepted.
Payment amount: Visa fee on the below table + SMS Service (KRW 1,500, Optional) + Additional services (Optional) = Total amount.
Service fee (KRW 5,770) is included in the below fee table. (Below fees are effective from 01 Apr 2023)
- Opting SMS service (KRW 1,500 won) would be recommended due to a security reason.

Click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/5wvtPDp0U6XDRVIHJOv779/b7455ce305049f8049c6925e9c688836/india-visa-fee-2024.pdf)
for your visa fee confirmation.

[ind > kor > en > Table:Tourist Visa > Fees and Charges 1]

## Photo Specifications
India Visa Application Center in Seoul provides Photograph service at a cost of 9,500 KRW. 
Photographs should be in color and strictly as per the specifications below.
- Photographs must be taken within the last 6 months.
- Un-mounted - 2 inch x 2 inch in size.
- Face should cover about 70 to 80% of the photo area.
- Frame Subject with Full Face, Front view, Eyes open
- The photographs must be clear, well defined and taken against a plain white background.
- Appropriate brightness and contrast showing your skin tones naturally
- Even lighting (no shadows across or behind the face)
- Face must be square to the camera with a neutral expression, neither frowning nor smiling and with your mouth closed.
- If you must wear a head covering for religious reasons, make sure your full facial features are not obscured.
- Non-tinted prescription glasses are allowed as long as your eyes are clearly visible. Make sure that the frame does not cover any part of your eyes. Sunglasses are not acceptable.
- Headphones, wireless hands-free devices, or similar items are not acceptable in your photo.
- Photograph for Child/babies - The photograph should show the baby or child awake, looking straight at the camera with mouth closed and nothing covering the mouth. It should also show both edges of the face clearly (no toys,
									blankets, chair backs or other people visible) and no hair across the eyes.

## Processing Time
Strictly do not finalize travel plans before receiving the service applied for. Processing times below are average processing times. Please plan your travel accordingly. 
VFS/Embassy of India would not be responsible for any inconvenience/problems faced as a result of finalizing travel plans before obtaining the relevant service.
Applicants sending their documents by Post/Courier are requested to ensure that they are completed and meet requirements. Processing times mentioned do not include transit time by post/courier. Transit times by Courier are generally
								1-3 days on average and may be higher in remote or rural areas.
- Average of 8 Working Days including submission day: For Korean nationals
- A minimum of 8 Calendar days including submission day: For Non-Korean nationals other than Pakistan
- 2 ~ 3 working days including submission day for Express service: Only for Korean nationals (Temporary unavailable)
- A minimum of 45 days but could take more time:
Nationals of Pakistan or any applicant (irrespective of current nationality) who previously held Pakistani nationality

The checklist for the application category that you apply for will provide details on which specific forms you may need to download. In some instances, there may be more than one form.  Complete application form/s for each person applying, prepare for supporting documents referring to the checklist. Ensure the documents are completed accurately and signed where needed.

## Overview

## Who can Apply?
- Applicant granted a particular type of Visa is required to strictly adhere to the purpose of the visit declared by him/her. Any violation of Visa category may attract appropriate legal action or deportation.
- A Business Visa is given to those who are doing business in India such as making sales or establishing contacts on behalf of a company outside of India. Those who are applying to work for an Indian company should apply for
									an Employment Visa. Those who are establishing a company in India should apply for a Business Visa as an Owner. Please refer to Business Visa (for owners) Checklist.
- Those who are applying for a long-term (more than one year) Business Visa, an interview and additional documents are required.
- Current original passport with a minimum validity of 6 months from the date of application is required.
- Please note that the duration of the visa is at the sole discretion of the Issuing Authority and the validity of the visa begins from the date of issue and not from the date of travel on your application form.
- The Business visa, 5-year / over validity is required biometrics process (fingerprint and portrait)

## Fees and Charges
If you wish to use Express service there will be additional cost of 4,720 KRW. (Please be noted that Express service is available only for Korean passport holders.)
You may use a courier service (optional) with a cost of 9,000 KRW to receive your passport at your place for your convenience.
For more information about additional services, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/kor/en/ind/additional-services).

- The photographs must be clear, well defined and taken against a plain white background.

- Even lighting (no shadows across or behind the face)
- Face must be square to the camera with a neutral expression, neither frowning nor smiling and with your mouth closed.

- Face must be       square to the camera with a neutral expression, neither frowning nor       smiling and with your mouth closed.

									applicant and the nature of their work.
- Please note that the application process will take at least 2 months, so prepare enough time for the procedure. Before the application process, please contact the Consulate and the press office of Embassy of India to have more
									information about Journalist Visa.
- The applicant will be invited in person for an interview and you may need to provide additional documents to the Embassy of India.
- Please note that the duration of the visa is at the sole discretion of the Issuing Authority and the validity of the visa begins from the date of issue and not from the date of travel on your application form.

## Fees and Charges
If you wish to use Express service there will be additional cost of 4,720 KRW. (Please be noted that Express service is available only for Korean passport holders.)
You may use a courier service (optional) with a cost of 9,000 KRW to receive your passport at your place for your convenience.
For more information about additional services, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/kor/en/ind/additional-services).
Please remit your fees to the following bank account:
Name of Bank: Shinhan Bank Bank Account Number: 140-014-727882 Account Holder Name: 브이에프에스코리아(VFS South Korea)
Payment receipt must be submitted to the centre in Seoul along with your application.
Please be noted that personal / company cheques, mobile / Phone banking receipts, ATM receipts or cash would not be accepted.
Payment amount: Visa fee on the below table + SMS Service (KRW 1,500, Optional) + Additional services (Optional) = Total amount.
Service fee (KRW 5,770) is included in the below fee table. (Below fees are effective from 01 Apr 2023)
							- Opting SMS service (KRW 1,500 won) would be recommended due to a security reason.
								Click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/5wvtPDp0U6XDRVIHJOv779/b7455ce305049f8049c6925e9c688836/india-visa-fee-2024.pdf) for your visa fee confirmation.

[ind > kor > en > Table:Journalist Visa > Fees and Charges 1]

## Photo Specifications
India Visa Application Center in Seoul provides Photograph service at a cost of 7,500 KRW. 
Photographs should be in color and strictly as per the specifications below.
- Photographs must be taken within the last 6 months.
- Un-mounted - 2 inch x 2 inch in size.
- Face should cover about 70 to 80% of the photo area.
- Frame Subject with Full Face, Front view, Eyes open
- The photographs must be clear, well defined and taken against a plain white background.
- Appropriate brightness and contrast showing your skin tones naturally
- Even lighting (no shadows across or behind the face)
- Face must be square to the camera with a neutral expression, neither frowning nor smiling and with your mouth closed.
- If you must wear a head covering for religious reasons, make sure your full facial features are not obscured.
- Non-tinted prescription glasses are allowed as long as your eyes are clearly visible. Make sure that the frame does not cover any part of your eyes. Sunglasses are not acceptable.
- Headphones, wireless hands-free devices, or similar items are not acceptable in your photo.
- Photograph for Child/babies - The photograph should show the baby or child awake, looking straight at the camera with mouth closed and nothing covering the mouth. It should also show both edges of the face clearly (no toys,
									blankets, chair backs or other people visible) and no hair across the eyes.

## Processing Time
Strictly do not finalize travel plans before receiving the service applied for. Processing times below are average processing times. Please plan your travel accordingly. 
 VFS/Embassy of India would not be responsible for any inconvenience/problems faced as a result of finalizing travel plans before obtaining the relevant service.
 Applicants sending their documents by Post/Courier are requested to ensure that they are completed and meet requirements. Processing times mentioned do not include transit time by post/courier. Transit times by Courier are generally
								1-3 days on average and may be higher in remote or rural areas.
- Average of 8 Working Days including submission day: For Korean nationals
- A minimum of 8 Calendar days including submission day: For Non-Korean nationals other than Pakistan
- 2 ~ 3 working days including submission day for Express service: Only for Korean nationals (Temporary unavailable)
- A minimum of 45 days but could take more time:
Nationals of Pakistan or any applicant (irrespective of current nationality) who previously held Pakistani nationality
Note: Please note that the application process for Journalist Visa will take at least two months, so it is advisable to apply for your visa at least 60 days before your intended date of travel.

## Checklist and Application Forms
The checklist for the application category that you apply for will provide details on which specific forms you may need to download. In some instances, there may be more than one form.  Complete a separate checklist and application form/s for each person applying. Ensure the documents are completed accurately and signed where needed.
Journalist Visa Checklist (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/5kyEXbaThv4MlQJ2ObTaXX/900b196b756a07dd89e999faf3669fba/journalist-visa-2024.pdf) - Updated on 08 Feb 2024 
Common Documents for Indian Visa (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1M453t9oCeaojrpmPAE0ZF/0302f3b7df7b0e9b0ae98a78f6f0084d/common-documents-eng.pdf) Updated on 08 Feb 2024 
Application Guideline & Upload List (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/2drrprDh9yvppEQXBnaAoC/117f7211b3cd5c88d6a03936c61d86b5/application-guideline-and-upload-list-eng.pdf) Updated on 08 Feb 2024 
Application form for Bangladeshi Nationals (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6MTxv8LGmKVe7tBxCYkpkg/e9690bc79581e5ba08606f1f432a871e/form_for_bangladeshi_nationals_150101.pdf) 
For Chinese passport holder: All chines applicants are required to submit E-ticket to visit India and a balance certificate from bank accounts in addition to other supporting documents mentioned on the checklist above.

- Embassy of India requires all applications to be completed online. Click “Apply Now” to continue.
- Incomplete applications or applications with incorrect photographs specifications cannot be accepted and will be returned.
